languages.text: {n}Праведник шумно оседает на пол. Его {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугменты{/g} какое-то время подрагивают, после чего замирают навсегда. Странное выражение застыло на лице — подобной улыбкой встречают свободу.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Праведник шумно оседает на пол. Его {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугменты{/g} какое-то время подрагивают, после чего замирают навсегда. Странное выражение застыло на лице — подобной улыбкой встречают свободу.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The triune man sinks noisily to the floor. His {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} shudder for a while, then stop forever. A strange expression is fixed on his face — a smile of liberation.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Праведник шумно оседает на пол. Его {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугменты{/g} какое-то время подрагивают, после чего замирают навсегда. Странное выражение застыло на лице — подобной улыбкой встречают свободу.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The triune man sinks noisily to the floor. His augments shudder for a while, then stop forever. A strange expression is fixed on his face — a smile of liberation.{/n}
{n}The triune man sinks noisily to the floor. His augments shudder for a while, then stop forever. A strange expression is fixed on his face — a smile of liberation.{/n}
{n}The triune man sinks noisily to the floor. His augments shudder for a while, then stop forever. A strange expression is fixed on his face — a smile of liberation.{/n}

languages.text: {n}三つの人物は床に轟きながら倒れ、{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}増幅器{/g}はしばらく震え、その後永遠に止まった。彼の顔には解放の微笑みが浮かんでいた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The triune man sinks noisily to the floor. His {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} shudder for a while, then stop forever. A strange expression is fixed on his face — a smile of liberation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 三つの人物は床に轟きながら倒れ、増幅器はしばらく震え、その後永遠に止まった。彼の顔には解放の微笑みが浮かんでいた。
{n}三つの人物は床に轟きながら倒れ、{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}増幅器{/g}はしばらく震え、その後永遠に止まった。彼の顔には解放の微笑みが浮かんでいた。{/n}

languages.text: {n}三位一体之人轰然倒地。他的{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}植入物{/g}抽搐了一会儿，最终归于死寂。他脸上定格着一种奇异的神情——那是解脱的微笑。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The triune man sinks noisily to the floor. His {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} shudder for a while, then stop forever. A strange expression is fixed on his face — a smile of liberation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}三位一体之人轰然倒地。他的{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}植入物{/g}抽搐了一会儿，最终归于死寂。他脸上定格着一种奇异的神情——那是解脱的微笑。{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'homme trinitaire s'effondre bruyamment au sol. Ses {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g} frémissent pendant quelques instants avant de s'arrêter pour toujours. Son visage est figé en une étrange expression : un sourire de délivrance.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The triune man sinks noisily to the floor. His {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} shudder for a while, then stop forever. A strange expression is fixed on his face — a smile of liberation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}L'homme trinitaire s'effondre bruyamment au sol. Ses {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g} frémissent pendant quelques instants avant de s'arrêter pour toujours. Son visage est figé en une étrange expression : un sourire de délivrance.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El hombre trino cae ruidosamente al suelo. Sus {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}aumentos{/g} se estremecen por un momento, y después se detienen para siempre. Hay una expresión extraña en su rostro: una sonrisa de liberación.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The triune man sinks noisily to the floor. His {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} shudder for a while, then stop forever. A strange expression is fixed on his face — a smile of liberation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El hombre trino cae ruidosamente al suelo. Sus {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}aumentos{/g} se estremecen por un momento, y después se detienen para siempre. Hay una expresión extraña en su rostro: una sonrisa de liberación.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Üçlü adam, gürültüyle yere yığılıyor. {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Ogmentleri{/g} bir süre titreyip sonra sonsuza dek duruyor. Yüzünde tuhaf bir ifade, bir kurtuluş gülümsemesi beliriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The triune man sinks noisily to the floor. His {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} shudder for a while, then stop forever. A strange expression is fixed on his face — a smile of liberation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Üçlü adam, gürültüyle yere yığılıyor. {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Ogmentleri{/g} bir süre titreyip sonra sonsuza dek duruyor. Yüzünde tuhaf bir ifade, bir kurtuluş gülümsemesi beliriyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der dreifaltige Mann sinkt geräuschvoll zu Boden. Seine {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Augmentationen{/g} zittern noch eine Weile, ehe sie für immer verstummen. Du erkennst einen seltsamen Ausdruck auf seinem Gesicht ... ein befreites Lächeln.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The triune man sinks noisily to the floor. His {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} shudder for a while, then stop forever. A strange expression is fixed on his face — a smile of liberation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der dreifaltige Mann sinkt geräuschvoll zu Boden. Seine {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Augmentationen{/g} zittern noch eine Weile, ehe sie für immer verstummen. Du erkennst einen seltsamen Ausdruck auf seinem Gesicht ... ein befreites Lächeln.{/n}
